integration_validation_v2.evidence: comfy.rs:839-866 NewIntakeOutput::saveimage_fallback + comfy.rs:2232-2280 mark/get_saveimage_fallback persist fallback markers/outputs as ArtifactStore-ref'd rows (no localhost /history dependency, per contract); tests/atelier_comfy_tests.rs:1252-1318 records a saveimage_fallback output, marks fallback idempotently, and produce_intake_receipt reconstructs the materialized artifact_ref against real PG. Contract sanctions fake-adapter tests and explicitly removes /history /view proof requirement.

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-105 [Pose-ComfyUI-Pipeline] SaveImage Output Discovery Fallback -- Preserve SaveImage fallback discovery as Handshake-native Workflow-Engine adapter receipts/output manifests
with fake-adapter tests and no direct localhost /history or /view proof requirement.
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for SaveImage Output Discovery Fallback
